metadata.title: Venezuela Ayuda — Humanitarian Aid Information
metadata.description: Centralized information about missing persons search, verified donations, and collection centers for Venezuela.

hero.title: Venezuela needs your help
hero.subtitle: Centralized information to find missing people, donate, and deliver supplies. All verified, all in one place.

impact.source: * Estimated figures based on official reports and humanitarian organizations

actions.title: How can you help today?
actions.description: Three direct ways to act. Pick one and start now.
actions.search_desc: Verified platforms to report and find missing persons.
actions.donate_desc: Verified organizations accepting donations for Venezuela.
actions.collect_desc: Physical locations where you can deliver supply donations.

desaparecidos.title: Missing Persons Search
desaparecidos.description: Verified platforms where you can search for information about missing people.
desaparecidos.warning: Always verify the source before sharing personal information.

donaciones.title: Monetary Donations
donaciones.description: Verified organizations that accept donations for Venezuela. All links open in a new tab.

ayuda.section_description: Verified organizations by category. Find where your support is needed most.

ninos.title: Children's Aid
ninos.description: Verified organizations providing protection and assistance to affected children and adolescents.

comida.title: Food
comida.description: Organizations providing emergency food and nutritional support in Venezuela.

salud.title: Health & Medicine
salud.description: Organizations sending medical supplies and health professionals to Venezuela.

registro.title: Aid Registry
registro.description: Platforms to register and coordinate humanitarian aid securely.

ingenieria.title: Engineering & Architecture
ingenieria.description: Resources for structural damage assessment and reconstruction assistance.

animales.title: Animals
animales.description: Rescue and care organizations for pets and animals affected by the earthquake.

acopio.title: Collection Centers
acopio.description: Physical locations where you can deliver supply donations. Select your country to see the nearest centers.
acopio.no_centers: No registered centers in your country yet. You can help by sending monetary donations.

contact.title: Missing a resource?
contact.description: Do you know a collection center, organization, or resource that should be listed here? Send us the information.
contact.name: Name
contact.placeholder_message: Describe the resource you want to add or suggest...
contact.success: Thank you! We'll review your request soon.
contact.rate_limited: You've sent too many messages. Please try again in an hour.
contact.error: There was an error. Please try again.

social.title: Stay up to date
social.description: Follow these accounts to stay updated on the situation in Venezuela and aid initiatives.

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and detect your location to show nearby collection centers. You can choose which cookies to accept.

footer.disclaimer: This platform is informational. Always verify directly with organizations before taking action.
footer.made_with: Made with love by Venezuelans, for Venezuela.
